plugins.name: Example Plugin
plugins.description: Demonstrates every Editora extension point (command, keybinding, tool window, editor menu item, status-bar segment, snippet).
plugins.author: Editora

plugins.name: Lorem Ipsum
plugins.description: Generate lorem-ipsum placeholder text: insert a paragraph at the caret, or replace the selection.
plugins.author: Editora

plugins.name: Text Tools
plugins.description: Transform the selection or whole document: case convert, sort/unique/reverse lines, trim trailing whitespace, squeeze blank lines.
plugins.author: Editora

plugins.name: Insert Tools
plugins.description: Insert a UUID or the current date/time at the caret in common formats.
plugins.author: Editora

plugins.name: Scratchpad
plugins.description: A persistent scratchpad tool window; auto-saves to the plugin's data dir.
plugins.author: Editora

plugins.name: Format Runner
plugins.description: Format the active file with an external formatter (prettier/black/gofmt/rustfmt/clang-format), chosen by extension.
plugins.author: Editora

plugins.name: Encode Tools
plugins.description: Encode/decode the selection or document: Base64, URL, HTML entities, ROT13, hex.
plugins.author: Editora

plugins.name: Hash Tools
plugins.description: Hash text to a hex digest (MD5/SHA-1/SHA-256): replace the selection, or insert the document's hash.
plugins.author: Editora

plugins.name: Markdown TOC
plugins.description: Insert a table of contents (linked bullet list) built from the document's Markdown headings.
plugins.author: Editora

plugins.name: Regex Tester
plugins.description: A live regex tester tool window: pattern + flags + test string, with match spans and capture groups.
plugins.author: Editora
